The Humaans HRIS API exposes the People, Compensations, Time Away, Documents,
Locations, Job Roles, Custom Fields, Performance, Timesheet, Webhooks, and
related resources of the Humaans system of record. The API is REST-based,
accepts and returns JSON, and uses Bearer token authentication scoped via
OAuth scopes (public:read, private:read, private:write, compensations:read,
compensations:write, documents:read, documents:write, webhooks:manage).
